parameterTypes.name: contractStatus
regexp: ((?:Draft|Marketed|Request to Quote|Quote Being Prepared|Quote|Bindable Quote|Firm Order|Correction In Progress|Signed|Endorsement|Template)(?: \d+)?)

parameterTypes.name: lockType
regexp: Unlock|Lock Contract \(except tag values\)|Lock Contract|Lock Template \(except tag values\)|Lock Template

parameterTypes.name: quoteDetailFieldsEnum
regexp: Quoted Line|Quote Reference|Validity Period \(Calendar Days\)|Notes|Subjectivities\/Line Conditions

parameterTypes.name: riskOverviewTabs
regexp: Risk Overview|Facility Overview|History|Risk Settings|Facility Settings|Brokering Partners|Declarations|Feedback

parameterTypes.name: shepherdTour
regexp: Auto Cascade Declarations Tour|Bulk Layer Operations Tour|Comparing With Library Tour|Contract View Tour|Correcting Stamps Tour|Create New Tour|Creating a Programme Tour|Converting a Contract Into a Programme Layer Tour|Defined Data View Tour|Editing Tag Sets Tour|Extended Data Questionnaire Tour|Importing Questions Into Draft Tour|Insert From Document Tour|Mandatory Tagging Tour|PDF Preview Tour|Renaming Drafts Tour|Sharing Facilities Tour|Short Stamp Name Tour|Show Mandatory Tags Tour|SUMO User Tour|Welcome To The Knowledge Base Tour

parameterTypes.name: stampVisibility
regexp: Share all stamps|Share Leader stamp with follower\(s\)|Show underwriters own stamp only
